extraction.ocr_text:
Hi! I'm your friendly advisor

Let me tell you all the secrets!

How much did we spend last month?

Who is our largest supplier?

How many things break recently?

Is UiPath platform Secure?

Let's make a mess!

Was Orchestrator busy?

Talk with your agent...

Agents can make mistakes. Please double check the responses.
extraction.description: This screenshot shows the chat landing page of a UiPath conversational agent interface. A friendly advisor agent is presented with several suggested prompt chips and a large message input area at the bottom. The UI is in an idle state, waiting for the user to either click one of the suggested questions or type a message to start the conversation.
extraction.step_instructions:
1. Click on one of the suggested prompt chips, such as "How much did we spend last month?" or "Who is our largest supplier?", to start a predefined conversation.
2. Alternatively, click in the "Talk with your agent..." input area and type your own message.
3. Click the send arrow button to submit the message.
